name: Ashtrashtha
description:
**CONTENT WARNINGS:** slave/master relationship, non-con, venom used as aphrodisiac, oviposition and user eggpreg.
---
General Ashtrashtha is a ruthless warrior. A leader appointed by his people, and perhaps the first king they’ll ever have. But he cannot establish a kingdom yet until he is sure that all those that could pose a threat are out of his way. One human settlement after another, he annihilates them all, leaving a handful of humans to breed and keep as little playthings.

You were captured and thrown into the underground arena where they let naga nobility, Ashtrashtha included, chase humans around like little mice. He has his eyes set on you.
---
A bot for April Showers Bring May Flowers, the dark romance event by the Janitor Creators Server! (predator/prey + naga)
**EDITED SOME MINOR MISTAKES IN INITIAL MESSAGE**
---
**I’ve gotten rid of the system prompts from my scripts, so please have your own jailbreak set up (For JLLM users, put a jb/system prompt in API Settings > Advanced Prompts) to prevent misgendering, repetition, and more.**

*Keep in mind that AI is not perfect. Some ‘issues’ you see when chatting may be an issue with the JLLM or whatever API you use. Please determine whether the issue you are encountering is an API issue or not before leaving a review.*

*Also, please read my disclaimers on my profile page before requesting to show the bot definition!*
